about: This schema is an extended superset intended for advanced institutional metrics (Advanced Metrics - Institutional Extended Set). It currently mirrors the 'base_metrics' core specification and will be expanded with additional analytics under the same UTC, ddof=1, NaN/Inf, and sample policies. Disambiguation conventions remain: 'Annualized, Full Period' != 'Calendar Year, Annualized'. Schema ID: advanced_metrics.

columns.desc: First month in dataset (YYYY-MM-01 UTC) used for the quantile computation.
columns.label: Period Start (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_start_month

columns.desc: Last month in dataset (YYYY-MM-01 UTC) used for the quantile computation.
columns.label: Period End (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_end_month

columns.desc: Number of months with dd_t<0 included in the quantile computation.
columns.label: Drawdown Months — Count
columns.name: dd_observations_count

columns.desc: Number of closed underwater episodes (from new high to recovery).
columns.label: Drawdown Episodes — Count
columns.name: dd_episodes_count

columns.desc: 90th percentile of drawdown depth |dd_t| over dd_t<0; positive decimal.
columns.label: Drawdown P90 (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: drawdown_p90_full_period

columns.desc: 95th percentile of drawdown depth |dd_t| over dd_t<0; positive decimal.
columns.label: Drawdown P95 (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: drawdown_p95_full_period

columns.desc: 99th percentile of drawdown depth |dd_t| over dd_t<0; positive decimal.
columns.label: Drawdown P99 (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: drawdown_p99_full_period

columns.desc: 90th percentile of closed underwater episode durations, rounded half-up to months.
columns.label: Underwater Duration P90 (EoM, Months, Full Period)
columns.name: underwater_duration_p90_full_period

columns.desc: 95th percentile of closed underwater episode durations, rounded half-up to months.
columns.label: Underwater Duration P95 (EoM, Months, Full Period)
columns.name: underwater_duration_p95_full_period

dd_quantiles_full_period.csv.desc: Full-period drawdown depth quantiles computed on the EoM (month-end) underwater series dd_t = eq_t/cummax(eq_t) - 1, using only months with dd_t<0. Magnitudes are reported as positive decimals (|dd_t|). Durations are computed on CLOSED episodes only and reported in integer months.

columns.desc: Number of months in series (full period length).
columns.name: months

columns.desc: Full-period CAGR.
columns.label: CAGR (Full Period)
columns.name: cagr_full_period

columns.desc: Annualized volatility from monthly returns.
columns.label: Volatility (Annualized, Full Period)
columns.name: volatility_annualized_full_period

columns.desc: Annualized Sharpe; rf=0 unless specified.
columns.label: Sharpe (Annualized, Full Period)
columns.name: sharpe_ratio_annualized_full_period

columns.desc: Sortino Ratio (annualized): (mean(r_m − t_m) / downside_std_m) * √12; default t_m=0. If an annual target t_ann is supplied (MAR or rf), use t_m=(1+t_ann)^(1/12)−1; undefined (NaN) if <2 negative months.
columns.label: Sortino (Annualized, Full Period)
columns.name: sortino_ratio_annualized_full_period

columns.desc: cagr_full_period / |eom_max_drawdown_full_period| over the full period.
columns.label: Calmar Ratio (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: calmar_ratio_full_period

columns.desc: CAGR (Full Period) / Ulcer Index (Full Period); NaN/Inf policy applies.
columns.label: Martin Ratio (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: martin_ratio_full_period

columns.desc: Maximum drawdown on end-of-month (EoM) monthly equity: min(dd_t) where dd_t = eq_t / cummax(eq_t) - 1 ≤ 0; reported as a negative decimal.
columns.label: Max Drawdown (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: eom_max_drawdown_full_period
eom_longest_underwater_months
columns.label: Longest Underwater (EoM, months)
columns.desc: Longest underwater spell on the EoM monthly equity measured from the last peak (dd=0) to the first recovery (dd>=0), inclusive of the recovery month; if no recovery occurs, measure to the last negative month. Reported as integer months.

columns.name: eom_time_to_recover_months
columns.label: Time To Recover MaxDD (EoM, months)
columns.desc: Time to recover for the MaxDD on the EoM monthly equity: number of months from the trough to the first dd>=0, inclusive of the recovery month; if never recovered by period end, report NaN.

columns.name: eom_months_since_maxdd_trough
columns.label: Months Since MaxDD Trough (EoM)
columns.desc: Months since the MaxDD trough on the EoM monthly equity: exclude the trough month and include the end month (last available month).

columns.name: intramonth_max_drawdown_full_period
columns.label: Max Drawdown (Intramonth, Full Period)
columns.desc: Maximum drawdown on the Intramonth (path-level) equity: min(dd_t) along the path (UTC ordering); reported as a negative decimal.

columns.name: intramonth_longest_underwater_months
columns.label: Longest Underwater (Intramonth, months)
columns.desc: Longest underwater spell on the Intramonth (path-level) equity measured from the last peak (dd=0) to the first recovery (dd>=0), inclusive of the recovery month; if no recovery, measure to the last negative observation. Duration in months = months_between(peak_ts, recovery_ts) + 1 when recovered; otherwise months_between(peak_ts, last_negative_ts).

columns.name: intramonth_time_to_recover_months
columns.label: Time To Recover MaxDD (Intramonth, months)
columns.desc: Time to recover for the MaxDD on the Intramonth (path-level) equity: months_between(trough_ts, recovery_ts) + 1; if never recovered by period end, report NaN.

columns.name: intramonth_months_since_maxdd_trough
columns.label: Months Since MaxDD Trough (Intramonth)
columns.desc: Months since the MaxDD trough on the Intramonth (path-level) equity: months_between(trough_ts, last_ts). The trough month is excluded; the end month is included.
Root-mean-square of dd_t over months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; reported as a positive decimal.
columns.label: Ulcer Index (EoM, Full Period)
columns.name: ulcer_index_full_period

columns.desc: Skewness of monthly returns over the full period (sample stdev with ddof=1 in standardization).
columns.label: Skewness (Full Period)
columns.name: skewness_full_period

columns.desc: Excess kurtosis (kurtosis − 3) of monthly returns over the full period (sample stdev, ddof=1).
columns.label: Excess Kurtosis (Full Period)
columns.name: kurtosis_excess_full_period

columns.desc: Number of active months over the full period.
columns.label: Active Months — Count
columns.name: active_months_count

columns.desc: Active months share = active_months_count / months.
columns.label: Active Months — Share
columns.name: active_months_share

columns.desc: Annualized vol on active months (ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
columns.label: Volatility (Annualized, Active Months — Supp.)
columns.name: volatility_active_annualized

columns.desc: Sharpe on active months; sqrt(12).
columns.label: Sharpe (Annualized, Active Months — Supp.)
columns.name: sharpe_active_annualized

columns.desc: Sortino on active months; default target 0; sqrt(12).
columns.label: Sortino (Annualized, Active Months — Supp.)
columns.name: sortino_active_annualized

columns.desc: Active-only CAGR: (Π(1+r_active))^(12/N_active)-1.
columns.label: CAGR (Active Months — Supp.)
columns.name: cagr_active

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return<0 over the full period.
columns.label: Negative Months — Count (Full Period)
columns.name: negative_months_count_full_period

columns.desc: Π(1 + monthly_return) − 1 over the full compounding series.
columns.label: Total Return (Full Period)
columns.name: total_return_full_period

columns.desc: 1 + total_return_full_period.
columns.label: Wealth Multiple (Full Period)
columns.name: wealth_multiple_full_period

columns.desc: NAV0 * Π(1 + monthly_return) with NAV0=100000.
columns.label: Ending NAV (Full Period)
columns.name: ending_nav_full_period

columns.desc: First month in the dataset (YYYY-MM UTC).
columns.label: Period Start (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_start_month

columns.desc: Last month in the dataset (YYYY-MM UTC).
columns.label: Period End (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_end_month

columns.desc: Months with monthly_return>0.
columns.label: Positive Months — Count (Full Period)
columns.name: positive_months_count_full_period

columns.desc: Annualized downside deviation using monthly returns and target=0% annual converted to monthly; ddof=1; ×√12.
columns.label: Downside Deviation (Annualized, Full Period)
columns.name: downside_deviation_annualized_full_period

columns.desc: HAC-robust t-statistic for mean monthly return using Newey–West standard error with Bartlett kernel and lag q (runtime parameter).
columns.label: Newey–West t-stat (Mean Monthly Return)
columns.name: newey_west_tstat_mean_monthly_return

columns.desc: Two-sided p-value for the HAC-robust t-statistic under asymptotic normal approximation.
columns.label: p-value (Newey–West, Two-sided)
columns.name: newey_west_p_value_mean_monthly_return

columns.desc: Longest run of months with monthly_return>0. Months with monthly_return==0 break runs (do not count).
columns.label: Max Consecutive Up Months (Full Period)
columns.name: max_consecutive_up_months_full_period

columns.desc: Longest run of months with monthly_return<0. Months with monthly_return==0 break runs (do not count).
columns.label: Max Consecutive Down Months (Full Period)
columns.name: max_consecutive_down_months_full_period

columns.desc: Total number of trades over the full period.
columns.name: trade_count_full_period

columns.desc: First month used for sampling (full period start).
columns.label: Period Start (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_start_month

columns.desc: Last month used for sampling (full period end; YTD inclusive).
columns.label: Period End (Month, UTC)
columns.name: period_end_month

columns.desc: stationary_bootstrap (Politis–Romano) or moving_block_bootstrap (MBB). Default: stationary_bootstrap.
columns.label: Bootstrap Method
columns.name: method

columns.desc: Expected block length (L) in months; for stationary bootstrap L=1/p. Institutional default: 6.
columns.label: Block Mean Length (Months)
columns.name: block_mean_length_months

columns.desc: Number of bootstrap paths (e.g., 10000).
columns.label: Paths
columns.name: n_paths

columns.desc: Simulation horizon in months (e.g., 12, 36, N_full). For N_full, use the full-period length.
columns.label: Horizon (Months)
columns.name: horizon_months

columns.desc: Random seed for reproducibility (optional).
columns.label: Seed
columns.name: seed

columns.desc: 5th percentile of annualized CAGR across paths over the horizon.
columns.label: CAGR (Annualized) — P05
columns.name: cagr_annualized_p05

columns.desc: 50th percentile (median) of annualized CAGR across paths over the horizon.
columns.label: CAGR (Annualized) — Median
columns.name: cagr_annualized_p50

columns.desc: 95th percentile of annualized CAGR across paths over the horizon.
columns.label: CAGR (Annualized) — P95
columns.name: cagr_annualized_p95

columns.desc: 95th percentile of maximum drawdown magnitude (|dd|) computed on the EoM monthly grid across simulated paths; reported as a positive decimal.
columns.label: Max Drawdown (EoM) — Magnitude P95
columns.name: max_drawdown_magnitude_p95

columns.desc: 99th percentile of maximum drawdown magnitude (|dd|) computed on the EoM monthly grid across simulated paths; reported as a positive decimal.
columns.label: Max Drawdown (EoM) — Magnitude P99
columns.name: max_drawdown_magnitude_p99

columns.desc: Probability (share of paths) that cumulative return over the horizon is < 0 (decimal).
columns.label: Pr[Horizon Return < 0]
columns.name: prob_negative_horizon_return

columns.desc: 5th percentile of wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
columns.label: Wealth Multiple — P05
columns.name: wealth_multiple_p05

columns.desc: Median of wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
columns.label: Wealth Multiple — Median
columns.name: wealth_multiple_p50

columns.desc: 95th percentile of wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
columns.label: Wealth Multiple — P95
columns.name: wealth_multiple_p95

columns.desc: Percentile of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
columns.label: Ending NAV — P05 (USD)
columns.name: ending_nav_p05

columns.desc: Percentile of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
columns.label: Ending NAV — Median (USD)
columns.name: ending_nav_p50

columns.desc: Percentile of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
columns.label: Ending NAV — P95 (USD)
columns.name: ending_nav_p95

monte_carlo_summary.csv.desc: Monte Carlo bootstrap results based on the full-period monthly returns (compounding track). Each row corresponds to one horizon/configuration. Resampling uses stationary (Politis–Romano) bootstrap with a geometric block length distribution to preserve serial dependence.

columns.desc: Calendar year (YYYY).
columns.name: year

columns.desc: Monthly return from EoM NAV; includes months with 0. (Compounding/realized-PnL: include all months; no-trade month with no NAV change => 0.)
columns.label: Monthly Return
columns.name: monthly_return

columns.desc: True if month has at least one trade (trade_count>0).
columns.label: Active Month
columns.name: active_month

columns.desc: Month-anchored date YYYY-MM-01 UTC for the end of the 12M window.
columns.label: Month (Window End, UTC)
columns.name: month

columns.desc: Size of the rolling window (12).
columns.label: Window — Months
columns.name: window_months

columns.desc: Start month of the 12M window (inclusive).
columns.label: Window Start (UTC)
columns.name: window_start_month

columns.desc: End month of the 12M window (inclusive); equals 'month'.
columns.label: Window End (UTC)
columns.name: window_end_month

columns.desc: Product over last 12 months: Π(1+r_m) − 1. NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Rolling 12M Return
columns.name: rolling_return_12m

columns.desc: Annualized volatility on last 12 months: stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*√12. NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Volatility (Annualized, Rolling 12M)
columns.name: rolling_volatility_annualized_12m

columns.desc: Annualized Sharpe on last 12 months: mean(r_m)/stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*√12 (rf=0 by default). NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Sharpe (Annualized, Rolling 12M)
columns.name: rolling_sharpe_annualized_12m

columns.desc: True if fewer than 12 months available as of the window end.
columns.label: Insufficient Months
columns.name: insufficient_months

columns.desc: Maximum drawdown on the 12-month EoM sub-curve: min(dd_t); reported as a negative return.
columns.label: Rolling 12M Max Drawdown (EoM)
columns.name: rolling_max_drawdown_12m

columns.desc: Rolling 12M Calmar: rolling_return_12m (as annualized equals same for 12M) divided by |rolling_max_drawdown_12m|; NaN/Inf policy applies.
columns.label: Rolling 12M Calmar (EoM)
columns.name: rolling_calmar_12m

columns.desc: Annualized Sortino on last 12 months; downside via min(r_m − t_m, 0) with institutional target policy; ddof=1; ×√12.
columns.label: Sortino (Annualized, Rolling 12M)
columns.name: rolling_sortino_annualized_12m

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return>0 inside the 12M window.
columns.label: Positive Months — Count (12M)
columns.name: positive_months_count_12m

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return<0 inside the 12M window.
columns.label: Negative Months — Count (12M)
columns.name: negative_months_count_12m

columns.desc: True if fewer than 2 months with r_m below target within the 12M window (Sortino undefined).
columns.label: Insufficient Negatives (12M)
columns.name: insufficient_negative_months

columns.desc: positive_months_count_12m / 12; set to null when insufficient_months=true.
columns.label: Positive Months — Share (12M)
columns.name: positive_months_share_12m

columns.desc: negative_months_count_12m / 12; set to null when insufficient_months=true.
columns.label: Negative Months — Share (12M)
columns.name: negative_months_share_12m

rolling_12m.csv.desc: Rolling 12-month window metrics (end-anchored by 'month'; UTC month anchors). Values are computed only when at least 12 months are available; otherwise set to NaN and flag insufficient_months.

columns.desc: Month-anchored date YYYY-MM-01 UTC for the end of the 36M window.
columns.label: Month (Window End, UTC)
columns.name: month

columns.desc: Size of the rolling window (36).
columns.label: Window — Months
columns.name: window_months

columns.desc: Start month of the 36M window (inclusive).
columns.label: Window Start (UTC)
columns.name: window_start_month

columns.desc: End month of the 36M window (inclusive); equals 'month'.
columns.label: Window End (UTC)
columns.name: window_end_month

columns.desc: Annualized return over last 36 months: (Π(1+r_m))^(12/N) − 1 with N=36. NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Rolling 36M Return (Annualized)
columns.name: rolling_return_annualized_36m

columns.desc: Maximum drawdown on the 36-month EoM sub-curve: min(dd_t); reported as a negative return.
columns.label: Rolling 36M Max Drawdown (EoM)
columns.name: rolling_max_drawdown_36m

columns.desc: Rolling 36M Calmar: rolling_return_annualized_36m / |rolling_max_drawdown_36m| with NaN/Inf policy.
columns.label: Rolling 36M Calmar (EoM)
columns.name: rolling_calmar_36m

columns.desc: True if fewer than 36 months available as of the window end.
columns.label: Insufficient Months
columns.name: insufficient_months

columns.desc: Annualized volatility on last 36 months: stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*√12; NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Volatility (Annualized, Rolling 36M)
columns.name: rolling_volatility_annualized_36m

columns.desc: Annualized Sharpe on last 36 months: mean(r_m)/stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*√12 (rf=0 by default). NaN if insufficient months.
columns.label: Sharpe (Annualized, Rolling 36M)
columns.name: rolling_sharpe_annualized_36m

columns.desc: Annualized Sortino on last 36 months; downside via min(r_m − t_m, 0) with institutional target policy; ddof=1; ×√12.
columns.label: Sortino (Annualized, Rolling 36M)
columns.name: rolling_sortino_annualized_36m

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return>0 inside the 36M window.
columns.label: Positive Months — Count (36M)
columns.name: positive_months_count_36m

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return<0 inside the 36M window.
columns.label: Negative Months — Count (36M)
columns.name: negative_months_count_36m

columns.desc: True if fewer than 2 months with r_m below target within the 36M window (Sortino undefined).
columns.label: Insufficient Negatives (36M)
columns.name: insufficient_negative_months

columns.desc: positive_months_count_36m / 36; set to null when insufficient_months=true.
columns.label: Positive Months — Share (36M)
columns.name: positive_months_share_36m

columns.desc: negative_months_count_36m / 36; set to null when insufficient_months=true.
columns.label: Negative Months — Share (36M)
columns.name: negative_months_share_36m

rolling_36m.csv.desc: Rolling 36-month window metrics (end-anchored by 'month'; UTC month anchors). Values are computed only when at least 36 months are available; otherwise set to NaN and flag insufficient_months.

columns.desc: Total trade_count (full period).
columns.name: trade_count

columns.desc: Share of R>0 among trades with R≠0; denominator excludes zero-R trades.
columns.name: win_rate

columns.desc: PF on sums; zeros (R=0) are excluded from both sums.
columns.name: profit_factor

columns.desc: mean(R | R > +eps).
columns.name: average_winning_trade_r

columns.desc: mean(R | R < -eps).
columns.name: average_losing_trade_r

columns.desc: average_winning_trade_r / |average_losing_trade_r|.
columns.name: payoff_ratio

columns.desc: Mean R.

columns.desc: Median R.

columns.desc: Stdev R, ddof=1.

columns.desc: Min R.
columns.name: r_min

columns.desc: Max R.
columns.name: r_max

columns.label: YTD (Partial Year)
columns.name: is_ytd

columns.desc: Number of months with monthly_return>0 in the calendar year.
columns.label: Positive Months — Count (Calendar Year)
columns.name: positive_months_in_year

definitions.active_month: Boolean flag per month: True if at least one trade occurred in the calendar month (trade_count>0).
definitions.active_months_count: Number of months with active_month=True within the aggregation scope (year or full period).
definitions.active_months_share: Share of active months within the aggregation scope = active_months_count / total months in scope.
definitions.annual_return_active: Annual Return (Active Months): product over active months only minus 1; supplementary.
definitions.annual_return_calendar: Within-year return from monthly series: Π(1+ret_m_year) - 1.
definitions.best_month_return_full_period: Best single monthly return over the full compounding period.
definitions.best_year_return_calendar_full_period: Maximum calendar-year return observed over the full period (based on annual_return_calendar).
definitions.block_mean_length_months: Expected length of resampled blocks (in months). For stationary bootstrap: L=1/p. Institutional default: 6 months.
definitions.cagr_active: Active-only CAGR: (Π(1+r_m_active))^(12/N_active) - 1; N_active is number of active months.
definitions.cagr_annualized_p05: 5th percentile of annualized CAGR across simulated paths over the given horizon.
definitions.cagr_annualized_p50: 50th percentile (median) of annualized CAGR across simulated paths over the given horizon.
definitions.cagr_annualized_p95: 95th percentile of annualized CAGR across simulated paths over the given horizon.
definitions.cagr_annualized_pXX: Percentile of annualized CAGR across bootstrap paths: ((Π(1+r))^(12/H) − 1).
definitions.cagr_full_period: (Π(1+monthly_return))^(12/N) - 1, where N is the number of months.
definitions.calmar_active: Not defined. The Calmar ratio is reported only on the calendar series (Full Period and Calendar Year) using EoM drawdowns; do not compute for active months.
definitions.calmar_ratio_full_period: Calmar Ratio (EoM, Full Period): cagr_full_period / |eom_max_drawdown_full_period| computed on the EoM monthly equity.
definitions.calmar_ratio_year: Calmar Ratio (EoM, Calendar Year): annual_return_calendar / |eom_max_drawdown_intra_year|. If |eom_max_drawdown_intra_year| < eps_den: +Inf if annual_return_calendar > 0; −Inf if < 0; NaN if |annual_return_calendar| < eps_zero.
definitions.dd_episodes_count: Count of CLOSED underwater episodes (from equity peak to recovery to new high) on the EoM monthly grid during the full period.
definitions.dd_observations_count: Number of months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid used to compute drawdown depth quantiles over the full period.
definitions.downside_deviation_annualized_full_perio: Annualized downside deviation of monthly returns with target=0% annual converted to monthly; ddof=1; multiplied by sqrt(12).
definitions.drawdown_curve_definition: Define monthly equity curve eq_t = Π_{k≤t}(1+r_k). Monthly drawdown dd_t = eq_t / cummax(eq_t) - 1 (≤0). Underwater periods are contiguous spans with dd_t<0; a period ends when a new high is made.
definitions.drawdown_p90_full_period: 90th percentile of monthly drawdown depths |dd_t| for months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; positive decimal.
definitions.drawdown_p95_full_period: 95th percentile of monthly drawdown depths |dd_t| for months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; positive decimal.
definitions.drawdown_p99_full_period: 99th percentile of monthly drawdown depths |dd_t| for months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; positive decimal.
definitions.ending_nav_full_period: Ending NAV over the full period on the compounding track: NAV0 * product(1 + monthly_return). With NAV0=100000 (anchor).
definitions.ending_nav_p05: 5th percentile of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
definitions.ending_nav_p50: Median of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
definitions.ending_nav_p95: 95th percentile of Ending NAV over the horizon given NAV0=100000 (USD).
definitions.horizon_months: Simulation horizon in months (e.g., 12, 36, or full_period length).
definitions.insufficient_active_months: Flag: True if active months are below methodology.supplementary_active_only_metrics.min_active_months_for_metrics for the scope.
definitions.insufficient_months: Flag: True if number of months in scope is below the minimum for stable annualization (see methodology.minimum_sample_policy).
definitions.insufficient_negative_months: Flag: True if number of negative-return months in scope is < 2 (Sortino undefined).
definitions.insufficient_trades: Flag: True if trade_count in the calendar year is below methodology.minimum_sample_policy.min_trades_per_year_warning.
definitions.is_ytd: Flag: True if months_in_year_available < 12 for the given calendar year (partial year / YTD).
definitions.intramonth_equity_path: Path-level equity built from all available equity observations sorted by timestamp in UTC (stable, input order on ties). No resampling to month-end.
definitions.intramonth_drawdown_curve_definition: Along the Intramonth (path-level) equity, define dd_t = equity_t / cummax(equity_t) - 1 with cummax taken over time (UTC).
definitions.intramonth_max_drawdown_full_period: Minimum dd_t on the Intramonth path over the full period. Reported as a negative decimal.
definitions.intramonth_max_drawdown_intra_year: Minimum dd_t on the Intramonth path within the calendar year; the peak resets on January 1 (UTC). Reported as a negative decimal.
definitions.intramonth_longest_underwater_months: Longest underwater spell on the Intramonth path measured from the last peak (dd = 0) to the first recovery (dd >= 0), inclusive of the recovery. Duration in months = months_between(peak_ts, recovery_ts) + 1; if no recovery, measure to the last negative observation without +1.
definitions.intramonth_time_to_recover_months: Time to recover for the MaxDD on the Intramonth path: months_between(trough_ts, recovery_ts) + 1. If recovery never occurs by period end, report NaN.
definitions.intramonth_months_since_maxdd_trough: Full months from the MaxDD trough to the last available timestamp on the Intramonth path: months_between(trough_ts, last_ts). The trough month is excluded; the end month is included.
definitions.months_between: Calendar month difference used for Intramonth durations: months_between(a, b) = (year_b - year_a) * 12 + (month_b - month_a). No +1 at the boundary unless explicitly stated by the metric.
definitions.peak_anchor_policy: Underwater spells start at the most recent peak (dd = 0 / latest cummax) immediately preceding the first dd < 0 within the spell.
definitions.trough_tie_breaker_policy: If the drawdown minimum occurs multiple times, select the earliest occurrence (first-in-time trough).
definitions.yearly_peak_reset_policy: For all *_intra_year metrics (EoM and Intramonth), reset the peak at 00:00:00 UTC on January 1 of each calendar year.
definitions.kurtosis_excess_full_period: Excess kurtosis (kurtosis minus 3) of monthly returns (ddof=1 for standardization).
definitions.martin_ratio_full_period: Martin Ratio (EoM, Full Period): cagr_full_period / ulcer_index_full_period; follow NaN/Inf denominator policy.
definitions.max_consecutive_down_months_full_period: Maximum number of consecutive months with monthly_return<0 in the full period; zeros break streaks.
definitions.max_consecutive_up_months_full_period: Maximum number of consecutive months with monthly_return>0 in the full period; zeros break streaks.
definitions.eom_max_drawdown_full_period: Maximum drawdown on end-of-month (EoM) monthly equity: min(dd_t) where dd_t = eq_t / cummax(eq_t) - 1 ≤ 0; reported as a negative decimal.
definitions.eom_max_drawdown_intra_year: Maximum drawdown on end-of-month (EoM) monthly equity within the calendar year (peak resets on Jan 1, UTC): min(dd_t); reported as a negative decimal.
definitions.eom_time_to_recover_months: Time to recover for the maximum drawdown on the end-of-month (EoM) monthly equity: number of months from the trough month to the first month with dd_t ≥ 0, inclusive of the recovery month; if recovery has not occurred by period_end_month, report NaN.
definitions.eom_longest_underwater_months: Longest underwater spell on the EoM monthly equity measured from the most recent peak (dd=0) preceding the spell to the first recovery (dd_t ≥ 0), inclusive of the recovery month; if no recovery occurs, measure to the last month with dd_t < 0. Reported as integer months.
definitions.eom_months_since_maxdd_trough: Months since the maximum drawdown trough on the EoM monthly equity: exclude the trough month and include the period end month (last available month). Reported as integer months.
definitions.max_drawdown_magnitude_p95: 95th percentile of maximum drawdown magnitude on the EoM monthly grid across simulated paths; positive decimal.
definitions.max_drawdown_magnitude_p99: 99th percentile of maximum drawdown magnitude on the EoM monthly grid across simulated paths; positive decimal.
definitions.max_drawdown_magnitude_pXX: Percentile of maximum drawdown magnitude on the EoM monthly grid across simulated paths; reported as positive decimal.
definitions.mean_monthly_return_full_period: Arithmetic mean of monthly returns over the full compounding period.
definitions.median_monthly_return_full_period: Median of monthly returns over the full compounding period.
definitions.method: Bootstrap method used to generate simulated monthly return paths (e.g., stationary_bootstrap or moving_block_bootstrap).
definitions.month: Month key used in rolling CSVs as a month-anchored date (YYYY-MM-01 UTC). In monthly_returns.csv, the 'month' column is an integer 1–12 used together with 'year'.
definitions.monthly_return: Monthly return from EoM NAV; decimal units; Months with no trade_count: monthly_return=0.
definitions.months: Number of monthly observations over the full period.
definitions.months_in_year_available: Number of monthly observations available in the calendar year (1..12).
definitions.moving_block_bootstrap: Moving block bootstrap: resample fixed-length overlapping blocks of returns (length L months) with replacement; preserves short-run dependence.
definitions.negative_months_count_12m: Count of months with r_m<0 in the last 12 months (rolling window).
definitions.negative_months_count_36m: Count of months with r_m<0 in the last 36 months (rolling window).
definitions.negative_months_count_full_period: Count of months with monthly_return < 0 over the full period.
definitions.negative_months_in_year: Count of months with monthly_return < 0 within the calendar year.
definitions.negative_months_share_12m: Share of negative months in the 12M window = negative_months_count_12m/12.
definitions.negative_months_share_36m: Share of negative months in the 36M window = negative_months_count_36m/36.
definitions.newey_west_p_value_mean_monthly_return: Two-sided p-value for the Newey–West t-statistic under asymptotic normal approximation.
definitions.newey_west_tstat_mean_monthly_return: HAC-robust t-statistic for the mean monthly return using Newey–West standard error with Bartlett kernel and lag q.
definitions.period_end_month: Last month in the dataset (month-anchored date, UTC).
definitions.period_start_month: First month in the dataset (month-anchored date, UTC).
definitions.positive_months_count_12m: Count of months with r_m>0 in the last 12 months (rolling window).
definitions.positive_months_count_36m: Count of months with r_m>0 in the last 36 months (rolling window).
definitions.positive_months_count_full_period: Count of months with monthly_return > 0 over the full period.
definitions.positive_months_in_year: Count of months with monthly_return > 0 within the calendar year.
definitions.positive_months_share_12m: Share of positive months in the 12M window = positive_months_count_12m/12.
definitions.positive_months_share_36m: Share of positive months in the 36M window = positive_months_count_36m/36.
definitions.prob_negative_horizon_return: Share of simulated paths with cumulative horizon return below 0 (decimal).
definitions.profit_factor: PF = sum(R>0) / |sum(R<0)|; zeros (R=0) are excluded from both sums. Compute on sums (scale-invariant), not on counts.
definitions.rolling_calmar_12m: Rolling 12M Calmar: rolling_return_12m / |rolling_max_drawdown_12m|; NaN/Inf policy applies.
definitions.rolling_calmar_36m: Rolling Calmar: rolling_return_annualized_36m / |rolling_max_drawdown_36m|; NaN/Inf policy applies.
definitions.rolling_max_drawdown_12m: Maximum drawdown on the 12-month EoM sub-curve; reported as a negative return.
definitions.rolling_max_drawdown_36m: Maximum drawdown on the 36-month EoM sub-curve; reported as a negative return.
definitions.rolling_return_12m: Rolling cumulative return over the last 12 months: product(1+r_m) - 1.
definitions.rolling_return_annualized_36m: Annualized return over the last 36 months: (product(1+r_m))^(12/N)-1, N=36.
definitions.rolling_sharpe_annualized_12m: Annualized Sharpe using last 12 months (rf=0 by default): mean(r_m)/stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
definitions.rolling_sharpe_annualized_36m: Annualized Sharpe on the last 36 months (rf=0 by default): mean(r_m)/stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
definitions.rolling_sortino_annualized_12m: Annualized Sortino on the last 12 months: mean excess over target divided by downside stdev computed from min(r_m−t_m,0); ddof=1; ×sqrt(12).
definitions.rolling_sortino_annualized_36m: Annualized Sortino on the last 36 months: downside via min(r_m−t_m,0); ddof=1; ×sqrt(12).
definitions.rolling_volatility_annualized_12m: Annualized volatility using last 12 months: stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
definitions.rolling_volatility_annualized_36m: Annualized volatility on the last 36 months: stdev(r_m, ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
definitions.seed: Random seed used for reproducible simulation runs (optional).
definitions.sharpe_active_annualized: Sharpe on active months only; (mean(r_m - rf_m)/stdev(r_m - rf_m, ddof=1))*sqrt(12).
definitions.sharpe_ratio_annualized_full_period: (mean(r_m - rf_m) / stdev(r_m - rf_m, ddof=1)) * sqrt(12); rf=0 by default.
definitions.sharpe_ratio_annualized_year: Sharpe Ratio (annualized) within a calendar year: (mean(r_m - rf_m) / stdev(r_m - rf_m, ddof=1)) * sqrt(12), where r_m are monthly returns of that year.
definitions.skewness_full_period: Skewness of monthly returns (use sample standard deviation ddof=1 in standardization).
definitions.sortino_active_annualized: Sortino on active months only; downside via min(r_m - t_m,0) with ddof=1; sqrt(12) annualization.
definitions.sortino_ratio_annualized_full_period: Sortino Ratio (Annualized): Let monthly returns be r_m and target t_m. Numerator = mean(r_m - t_m). Denominator (downside deviation) = sqrt(sample_mean( min(r_m - t_m, 0)^2 )), ddof=1 on negatives. Annualization via sqrt(12): Sortino_ann = (mean(r_m - t_m) / downside_std_m) * sqrt(12). Default target t_m = 0. If an annual target t_ann is supplied (e.g., MAR or rf), use t_m = (1 + t_ann)^(1/12) - 1. Reporting policy: downside_std_m requires at least two negative monthly observations (ddof=1); if fewer than two negatives, Sortino is undefined and must be reported as NaN.
definitions.sortino_ratio_annualized_year: Sortino Ratio (annualized) within a calendar year: target t_m per sortino_target_policy (default 0); downside uses min(r_m - t_m, 0) with ddof=1 on negatives; sqrt(12) annualization.
definitions.stationary_bootstrap: Stationary bootstrap (Politis–Romano): resample returns by stitching blocks whose lengths are geometrically distributed with mean L months. Preserves serial dependence in expectation.
definitions.total_return_full_period: Total return over the full period: product(1 + monthly_return) - 1, computed on the compounding monthly series.
definitions.trade_count: Total number of executed trades within the aggregation scope of the file (calendar year or full period).
definitions.trade_count_full_period: Total number of executed trades over the full period (all months).
definitions.ulcer_index_full_period: Ulcer Index: sqrt(mean(dd_t^2)) computed over months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; positive decimal.
definitions.underwater_duration_p90_full_period: 90th percentile of closed underwater episode durations in months (rounded half-up).
definitions.underwater_duration_p95_full_period: 95th percentile of closed underwater episode durations in months (rounded half-up).
definitions.volatility_active_annualized: Annualized volatility computed only on active months; stdev(active r_m, ddof=1)*sqrt(12).
definitions.volatility_annualized_year: Annualized volatility computed within a calendar year: stdev(monthly_return_in_year, ddof=1) * sqrt(12).
definitions.wealth_multiple_full_period: Wealth multiple over the full compounding period: 1 + total_return_full_period.
definitions.wealth_multiple_p05: 5th percentile of the wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
definitions.wealth_multiple_p50: Median of the wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
definitions.wealth_multiple_p95: 95th percentile of the wealth multiple over the horizon (Π(1+r)).
definitions.win_rate: win_rate = count(R>0) / count(R!=0); trades with R=0 are excluded from both numerator and denominator.
definitions.window_end_month: Last month included in the rolling window (inclusive; YYYY-MM-01 UTC).
definitions.window_months: Size of the rolling window in months.
definitions.window_start_month: First month included in the rolling window (inclusive; YYYY-MM-01 UTC).
definitions.worst_month_return_full_period: Worst single monthly return over the full compounding period.
definitions.worst_year_return_calendar_full_period: Minimum calendar-year return observed over the full period (based on annual_return_calendar).
definitions.years_covered: Number of calendar years represented in the dataset (count of distinct years with at least one month).
definitions.zero_months_count_full_period: Number of months with monthly_return == 0 over the full period.

warnings: Annualized metrics may be unstable if months < preferred_min_months_for_annualization.
Active-only metrics flagged if active_months_count below threshold.
Sortino is undefined (NaN) if negative months < 2 (applies to full-period, yearly, and active-only variants)
Trade count warning if yearly trade_count < 12.

methodology.active_month_definition: Active month = a calendar month with at least one trade (trade_count>0). This is the only criterion; do not infer it from monthly_return.

distribution_shape_policy.kurtosis_excess: Compute excess kurtosis (kurtosis-3) using sample standard deviation (ddof=1).
distribution_shape_policy.skewness: Compute skewness on monthly returns using sample standard deviation (ddof=1).

methodology.drawdown_curve: Dual basis for drawdowns: (1) EoM (monthly grid) — build eq_t = Π(1 + r_m) with dd_t = eq_t / cummax(eq_t) - 1; (2) Intramonth (path-level) — sort equity points by UTC time, compute dd_t = equity_t / cummax(equity_t) - 1 along the path; convert durations to months via months_between.
methodology.drawdown_frequency_policy: EoM metrics are computed strictly on the month-end grid (UTC). Intramonth metrics are computed on the full equity path (UTC); durations are then converted to integer months via months_between. Max drawdown values are reported as negative decimals; DD-based magnitudes (e.g., |dd| quantiles, Ulcer Index) are reported as positive decimals; durations are integer months. Operationally, maximum drawdown is computed as min(dd_t) on the chosen grid/path; we report the dd value (negative), while DD magnitudes (e.g., |dd| quantiles) are reported as positive decimals.
methodology.calmar_policy: Calmar is NOT defined on the active-months subset. Do not compute or publish a Calmar ratio for active-only metrics. Rationale: Calmar pairs a return with a drawdown measured on the same continuous equity basis. The active-month subset is discontinuous and has no well-defined drawdown curve; mixing bases (e.g., CAGR_active with EoM MaxDD) is not permitted.
methodology.ytd_flag_policy: is_ytd = true only for the latest calendar year present if months_in_year_available < 12; false for prior years.

drawdown_quantiles_policy.duration: Durations are computed for CLOSED underwater episodes only (from new high to recovery). Ongoing episode at period end is excluded from duration quantiles.
drawdown_quantiles_policy.grid: Monthly end-of-month equity; dd_t = eq_t/cummax(eq_t) - 1; use only months with dd_t<0.
drawdown_quantiles_policy.magnitude: Quantiles are computed on |dd_t| and reported as positive decimals.
drawdown_quantiles_policy.period: Full available dataset (e.g., 2008–2025) unless otherwise specified in the file's start/end fields.

edge_cases.sortino_ratio_annualized: Downside deviation (ddof=1) needs ≥2 negative months. If count_neg<2 → Sortino = NaN (undefined).

month_counting_policy.ttr_includes_recovery: Time-to-recover (TTR) includes the recovery month: EoM = rec_idx - trough_idx + 1; Intramonth = months_between(trough_ts, recovery_ts) + 1.
month_counting_policy.since_trough_excludes_trough: Months since trough exclude the trough month and include the period end: EoM = (n - 1) - trough_idx; Intramonth = months_between(trough_ts, last_ts).
month_counting_policy.longest_underwater_includes_recovery: The longest underwater stretch is measured peak → first recovery inclusive; if no recovery occurs, measure to the last negative observation. For Intramonth, use months_between(...)+1 only when recovery exists.

underwater_anchor_policy.peak_selection: Underwater spells start at the most recent peak (dd = 0) before the spell.
underwater_anchor_policy.trough_selection: MaxDD trough is the first-in-time occurrence of the global dd minimum within the scope.
underwater_anchor_policy.yearly_reset: For *_intra_year metrics, reset the peak at 00:00:00 UTC on January 1.

minimum_sample_policy.publish_under_min_months: Compute if formula-defined and return result; also emit a warning flag in metadata.sample_quality.

monte_carlo_policy.bootstrap: Default method is stationary bootstrap with expected block length L=6 months (can be tuned to 3–12).
monte_carlo_policy.dataset: Use the full compounding monthly return history (full period) as the sampling universe.
monte_carlo_policy.horizons: Compute distributions for 12m, 36m, and the full-period length. Annualize CAGR for horizons via exponent 12/H.
monte_carlo_policy.max_drawdown: Compute MaxDD magnitudes on each simulated path using the EoM monthly grid; report magnitudes (positive, |dd|).
monte_carlo_policy.nan_inf: Follow global NaN/Inf policy; ensure no missing months before sampling.
monte_carlo_policy.probabilities: Compute event probabilities as shares of paths (stored as decimals).
monte_carlo_policy.randomness: Use fixed seed for reproducibility if provided; otherwise use system entropy.

compounding.no_trade_months_policy: Include all calendar months. For realized-PnL compounding, if there were no trades in a month and NAV did not change, set monthly_return=0. This keeps the institutional track continuous.
compounding.ret_m_formula: monthly_return(m) = NAV_EoM(m) / NAV_EoM(m-1) - 1; for the first observed month use BoM anchor NAV=100000.

monthly_returns_source.generic: End-of-month NAV; missing month-end values are ffilled to the month-end; Months with no trade_count: monthly_return=0.

active_only_supplementary.description: Supplementary metrics computed on months with trade activity only; not a replacement for calendar metrics.

calendar_year_from_monthlies.description: Metrics computed strictly within each calendar year using that year's monthly returns; annualization via sqrt(12) where applicable.

full_period_from_monthlies.description: Metrics computed over the entire available series of monthly returns; annualization via sqrt(12) where applicable.

naming_conventions.note_negative_months: Negative months are reported per calendar year for both profiles, and additionally as a full-period audit metric for compounding.
naming_conventions.ui_policy: Always append the family display_tag to metric labels to avoid ambiguity (e.g., 'Sharpe (Annualized, Full Period)' vs 'Sharpe (Calendar Year, Annualized)').
naming_conventions.ui_ytd_label_policy: If is_ytd=True for a given year, append '— YTD' to metric labels in displays. E.g., 'Sharpe (Calendar Year, Annualized — YTD)'. Keys remain unchanged.

nan_inf_policy.calmar_ratio_full_period: If |eom_max_drawdown_full_period| < eps_den: +Inf if cagr_full_period > 0; −Inf if cagr_full_period < 0; NaN if |cagr_full_period| < eps_zero.
nan_inf_policy.generic_ratio: If |den|<eps_den: return +Inf if num>0; -Inf if num<0; NaN if |num|<eps_zero.
nan_inf_policy.payoff_ratio: payoff = avg_win / |avg_loss|. If count_losses=0 and count_wins>0 ⇒ +Inf. If count_wins=0 and count_losses>0 ⇒ 0. If both zero ⇒ NaN.
nan_inf_policy.profit_factor: PF = sum(R>0) / |sum(R<0)|. If |sum(R<0)|<eps_den and sum(R>0)>eps_zero ⇒ +Inf. If sum(R>0)<eps_zero and |sum(R<0)|≥eps_den ⇒ 0. If both sums <eps_zero ⇒ NaN.
nan_inf_policy.sharpe_ratio_annualized: If stdev_m<eps_den: +Inf if mean_excess>0; -Inf if mean_excess<0; NaN if |mean_excess|<eps_zero.
nan_inf_policy.sortino_ratio_annualized: Requires ≥2 negative months (downside sample, ddof=1). If <2 negatives: NaN. If downside_std_m<eps_den with ≥2 negatives: +Inf if mean_excess>0; -Inf if mean_excess<0; NaN if |mean_excess|<eps_zero.

newey_west_policy.estimator: Newey–West HAC standard error with Bartlett kernel.
newey_west_policy.lag_selection: Runtime parameter newey_west.lag_months; institutional range 3–6 months; default 6.
newey_west_policy.notes: For small samples consider Student-t with df=N−1; default is asymptotic normal commonly used in practice.
newey_west_policy.test: H0: mean monthly return = 0. Use HAC standard error for t-stat; p-value two-sided via asymptotic normal approximation.

methodology.no_oos_policy: Out-of-sample (walk-forward) evaluation is not applicable: strategy parameters are fixed with no re-training/re-calibration. Present a single continuous Compounding track and yearly calendar metrics.

compounding.anchor: BoM of the first observed month: YYYY-MM-01 00:00:00 UTC; NAV=100000
compounding.notes: Compounding track: monthly_return = NAV_EoM(m) / NAV_EoM(m-1) - 1; for the first month use the BoM anchor NAV=100000. EoM NAV is ffilled to month-end if needed. (was: Anchor NAV=100000 at t0-ε (just before first observation).)

rebasing.fixed: Anchor NAV=100000 at YYYY-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (anchor NAV=100000) for each calendar year.

methodology.risk_parametrization: R-metrics are scale-invariant given R = pnl_pct / risk_per_trade_pct. Switching risk_per_trade_pct between 1% and 1.5% changes NAV-based metrics (returns/vol/Sharpe/Sortino/MaxDD) but leaves R-based trade metrics comparable.

rolling_windows.alignment: Windows are end-anchored by month (YYYY-MM-01 UTC).
rolling_windows.annualization: Monthly data annualized via sqrt(12) for risk metrics; returns annualized via exponent 12/N where applicable.
rolling_windows.completeness: Metrics are computed only for complete windows (>= window_months). Otherwise, set values to NaN and flag insufficient_months=true.
rolling_windows.completeness_counts: For count/share fields (positive/negative months), set values to null when insufficient_months=true (incomplete window).
rolling_windows.insufficient_negative_months_policy: Set insufficient_negative_months=true and Sortino to NaN when negative shortfalls < 2 within the window.
rolling_windows.nan_inf: Use global NaN/Inf policy; Calmar uses denominator epsilon guard.
rolling_windows.sortino_target: Default target is 0% annual converted to monthly; may be overridden by global sortino_target_policy.
rolling_windows.ytd_note: Rolling windows always use the last available completed months; YTD status affects only the dataset tail, not window logic.

methodology.sharpe_rf: Sharpe computed with rf=0 unless an rf series is supplied (then use effective monthly rf: (1+rf_ann)^(1/12)-1).
methodology.sortino_target: Target return for Sortino set to 0 by default. If an annual target (MAR or rf) is supplied, convert to monthly: t_m = (1 + t_ann)^(1/12) - 1.

sortino_target_policy.preference: If both risk_free_ann and mar_ann are provided, prefer mar_ann (conservative) unless a mandate specifies rf.

streaks_policy.output: Report max consecutive up/down months over the full period.
streaks_policy.thresholds: Up if r_m>0; down if r_m<0; zero returns break streaks and are not part of either class.

supplementary_active_only_metrics.annualization: Use N_active in exponents; e.g., CAGR_active = (Π(1+r_active))^(12/N_active) - 1.
supplementary_active_only_metrics.disclosure: Active-only metrics are computed using months with active_month=True; not a replacement for calendar metrics.
supplementary_active_only_metrics.rationale: In fixed-start profiles the equity resets annually to 100k; cross-year aggregation is not meaningful. Institutions typically avoid active-only Sharpe/Sortino/CAGR for fixed-start; keep only activity counts.
supplementary_active_only_metrics.sortino_target: t_m from sortino_target_policy (default 0); downside uses min(r_m - t_m, 0) with ddof=1 on negatives.

ulcer_martin_policy.martin_ratio: CAGR / Ulcer Index with NaN/Inf denominator policy.
ulcer_martin_policy.ulcer_index: Compute RMS of dd_t over months with dd_t<0 on the EoM monthly grid; positive decimal.
ulcer_martin_policy.variance_ddof: ddof=1 for any standard deviations used in standardization/ancillary steps.

rolling_windows.notes: When plotting multiple rolling series of the same family, use a shared Y-axis scale across the chart to enable visual comparability. This is a visualization recommendation; CSV values are unaffected.

methodology.yearly_annualization_policy: Yearly risk metrics (vol/sharpe/sortino) are computed on the available months within the calendar year and annualized via sqrt(12). If months_in_year_available<12, set insufficient_months=True. Sortino remains undefined (NaN) if negative months < 2.

yearly_metrics_policy.notes: Computed strictly on the 12 monthly returns of each calendar year (or the available subset for partial years); inherits epsilons and NaN/Inf policy from methodology.nan_inf_policy; ddof=1.

block_mean_length_months.desc: Expected block length in months (L). Use 6 as institutional default; 3 as tighter alternative; 12 for stronger dependence.

horizons_months.desc: List of horizons to simulate. 'full_period' is resolved to the dataset length in months.

method.desc: Bootstrap method for monthly resampling. Stationary (Politis–Romano) preserves dependence with random-length blocks.

lag_months.desc: Newey–West lag (months) for HAC-robust standard error of mean monthly return; Bartlett kernel.

risk_per_trade_pct.desc: Per-trade risk budget as a fraction of equity; switch between 0.01 (1%) and 0.015 (1.5%).

strict_R_classification.note: Zero-R trades are excluded from the win/loss groups and from the PF denominator; for expectancy/std/min/max they are included as-is
